custom_commands: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; rm -rf /root/installer; if [ -d /run/arch-linux-setups-installer ]; then cp -a /run/arch-linux-setups-installer /root/installer; else git clone https://github.com/FrosteAto/Arch-Linux-Setups.git /root/installer; fi'

bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p /var/log/arch-linux-setups; LOG=/var/log/arch-linux-setups/install-$(date +%F_%H-%M-%S).log; echo "==> Running installer (MODE=server)"; echo "==> Logging to $LOG"; env MODE=server stdbuf -oL -eL bash /root/installer/install.sh 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG"'
